prestazioni: Engine: F154CD 3.9L Twin-Turbo V8 – Upgraded turbochargers to **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** with billet compressor wheels (71mm inducer, 106mm exducer) and Inconel turbine wheels, paired with **Tial MV-R 60mm wastegates** and **TurboSmart Race Port BOV** for optimized spool and reduced lag. Custom **Novitec Powerkit Stage 3** ECU remap with 900+ hp target on **Shell V-Power 102 RON** fuel, retaining OEM direct injection while adding **AEM 2200cc port injectors** for supplementary fueling.

Drivetrain: **Wavetrac ATB differential** with **Ferodo DS3000 380mm CCM front brake rotors** and **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers**, paired with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35 ZR20 front, 345/30 ZR21 rear)** on **HRE FF03 20x10.5J and 21x13J forged wheels**. **Novitec Sport Springs** (20mm drop) with **Öhlins TTX46 coilovers** (3-way adjustable damping, 12-position rebound) for track-focused compliance.

Exhaust: **Capristo 102RS 4.5-inch titanium exhaust system** with **Akrapović downpipes** (catless, 3.5-inch diameter) and **REMUS Valvetronic bypass valves** for adjustable backpressure. **Novitec X-Pipe crossover** with **Scorpion Race Catalysts (200-cell)** to maintain Euro 6d compliance while reducing restriction by 42%.
estetica: **Novitec N-Largo widebody kit** (carbon fiber, 60mm rear fender flares, 40mm front) with **custom Vorsteiner V-FF107 front splitter** (3D-milled carbon, 3-stage adjustable) and **Rocket Bunny GT-S rear diffuser** (integrated **Aeromotions active rear wing** with 3-position angle control).

**Novitec Monoblock S forged wheels** (20x11J front, 21x14J rear) in **Gloss Gunmetal** with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (295/30 ZR20 front, 355/25 ZR21 rear)** and **H&R Track+ bolt-on spacers (15mm front, 25mm rear)** for aggressive stance. **Carbon Revolution CR-9 wheels** (optional) for weight reduction (8.5kg per wheel).

**Novitec Carbon Fiber Engine Bay Kit** (full OEM-style weave) with **custom titanium bolt kit (ARP 625+)** and **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller** (mounted in **Novitec carbon fiber center console insert**). **Luxury Carbon Fiber rear decklid** (with integrated **Novitec carbon fiber roll hoop cover**) and **LED taillight delete (OEM-style smoked lenses)** for stealth aesthetics.
